title: tagetes pringlei
intro: Tagetes pringlei, also known as Mexican marigold or pringle's marigold, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the daisy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant's extracts have been found to exhibit antioxidant and antiviral activities, offering potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and boosting the immune system. Tagetes pringlei is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to support overall well-being and promote natural healing.
